# Contribution Guidelines
> Remember: These are *guidelines*, not *rules*,
> if the only way to improve upon this project
> or fix a problem is to break/bend a guideline,
> then do it. Code will never be beautiful anyway.

## AI Usage Guidelines
What you *can* use AI for:
* Comprehending code
* Reviewing code
* Learning a subject
* Finding problems

What you *cannot* use AI for:
* Writing code
* Writing issues, PRs, etc.

## Reporting Issues
Before you report an issue, please check if that
issue hasn't already been reported.

If you can, add any output from the script that
might help find the problem.

Follow the AI Usage Guidelines
